title: ngrok Tunnel
description: A Tunnel represents an individual tunnel connection within a tunnel session, exposing a local service via a public URL through the ngrok network.

public_url.description: The public URL of the tunnel.

started_at.description: Timestamp when the tunnel was started.

metadata.description: Arbitrary user-defined metadata for the tunnel.

proto.description: The protocol of the tunnel (e.g., http, https, tcp, tls).

region.description: The ngrok region where the tunnel is running.

tunnel_session.description: Reference to the tunnel session that created this tunnel.

endpoint.description: Reference to the endpoint associated with this tunnel.

labels.description: Labels assigned to the tunnel for routing with labeled tunnels.

backends.description: References to the backends this tunnel is attached to.

forwards_to.description: The address that this tunnel forwards traffic to.

uri.description: URI of the tunnel API resource.
